name: Crypto Info Applet
description: Get real-time crypto prices for any token

get_price.title: Get Coin Price by CoinGecko ID
get_price.description: Get the current USD price for a cryptocurrency using its CoinGecko ID. You must pass the exact ID used by CoinGecko, e.g., 'bitcoin', 'ethereum', 'solana', not symbols like 'BTC' or 'ETH'. Refer to https://api.coingecko.com/api/v3/coins/list for full list.

id.description: The CoinGecko ID of the cryptocurrency (e.g. 'bitcoin', 'ethereum')
